calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-17-2009 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jul-28-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Simon R. Goodfellow, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Steel Arc Properties, LLC, a California limited liability company.
Kurt Biddle, Asset Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Titan Private Equity Group, LLC, a California Limited Liability Company.
Default was entered against defendant on November 21, 2008.
Doe defendant were dismissed today, July 28, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Steel Arc Properties, LLC, a California limited liability company, and against the Defaulted Defendant Titan Private Equity Group, LLC, a California limited liability company as follows:

Damages/Principal - $45,947.56.
Prejudgment Interest - $5,980.25.
Attorney's Fees - $9,680.00.
Costs - $356.77, for a total judgment in the amount of $61,964.58.

Additionally, defendant must pay plaintiff post-judgment interest of $12.59 per day, commencing July 29, 2009.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-11-2009 Continued To Aug-31-09 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-03-2009 Set For Order To Show Cause On May-26-09 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-31-2008 Continued To Mar-20-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
